title: UTV2-586: Runtime burn-in proof window — live MLB/NHL/NBA pipeline

UTV2-606.fix: SYNDICATE_MACHINE_ENABLED threaded through AppEnv — board-scan gate now receives config value instead of reading process.env directly

UTV2-644.fix: modelRegistry + experimentLedger added to createDatabaseRepositoryBundle — candidate-scoring was silently returning null for every champion lookup

UTV2-645.fix: DatabaseMarketUniverseRepository.findByIds chunked to 100 per request — 2133 UUIDs in single IN clause exceeded Node.js fetch URL limits

provider_offers.evidence: system-pick-scanner: scan.completed scanned=100 materialized=83; market-universe-materializer: offersRead=1000 upserted=446

market_universe.evidence: 431-446 markets across NBA/NHL/MLB updated every 5-min cycle; refreshed_at within 1 minute

pick_candidates.evidence: board-scan: scanned=1000 qualified=329-358 per cycle; total 2434 candidates in DB

candidate_scoring.evidence: ranked-selection: ranked=744; no_unscored_candidates on startup (all qualified candidates scored). noChampionSkipped blocked until UTV2-644 merged.

syndicate_board.evidence: board-construction: boardSize=18 boardRunId=03ff7ca8; 726 entries in syndicate_board; skippedSportCap=294 skippedMarketDup=79

picks_created.evidence: board-pick-writer: written=9 skipped=7 errors=2 (concurrent duplicate); 11 picks created today source=board-construction all status=validated

distribution_outbox.evidence: outbox_new=0; all 11 picks have promotion_status=suppressed — board-construction picks lack promotionScores metadata; promotion policy minimum score check fails

gaps_discovered.description: modelRegistry absent from repository bundle — all candidates skipped with no_champion_skip
board-construction picks suppressed by promotion policy — missing promotionScores metadata

verdict: PARTIAL — pipeline proven from offers through pick creation (6/8 stages). Blocked at distribution by UTV2-646 (promotion scoring gap). Candidate pipeline and model registry are operational. CLV scoring will activate once picks reach outbox/posted state.
